授業目的: Upon completion of this course, the students should be able to acquire the basic skills needed to undertake strategic management.The students should be able to undertake case studies and statistical methods on the basis of the framework to be learned through this course.
到達目標: Upon completion of this course, the students should be able to acquire the basic skills needed to undertake strategic management.The students should be able to undertake a case studies and statistical methods on the basis of the framework to be learned through this course.
授業方法: Lecture and in-class discussions based on the text,papers and case materials are the core of this course. Students will be required to fully prepare for each class and to actively express their thoughts, as well as share their experiences.The student have to read 4 to 5 academic papers(about 80～100pages) every week. Demonstrating their understanding of the acquired knowledge by presenting their thoughts and analyses both individually is highly encouraged. Interactive discussions, sharing of experiences and participation are key components of this course.

第1回:
【Startup Week】Online class（Simultaneous two-way format）/ Class hours：《90minutes》
Guidance
Online information will upload later.
第2回:
【Core Weeks①】Face-to-face class / Class hours：《90minutes》
1.MANAGERS AND MANAGING: Overview of managerial tasks / Management thought / Course introduction.
第3回:
【Core Weeks②】Face-to-face class / Class hours：《90minutes》
2.VALUES, ATTITUDES, EMOTIONS AND CULTURE: Personality traits / Organizational culture / Constraining or enabling?
第4回:
【Core Weeks③】Face-to-face class / Class hours：《90minutes》
3. STAKEHOLDERS AND SOCIAL RESPONSIBILITY: Ethics and law / Profit impact of ethics / Boundaries on what needs to be managed.
第5回:
【Core Weeks④】Face-to-face class / Class hours：《90minutes》
4.DECISION MAKING AND LEARNING: Cognitive biases / Group decision making / Organizational learning.
第6回:
【Core Weeks⑤】Face-to-face class / Class hours：《90minutes》
5.PLAN AND STRATEGY: Mission and goals / Competitive analysis / Firm boundary.
第7回:
【Core Weeks⑥】Face-to-face class / Class hours：《90minutes》
6.VALUE CHAIN: Value chain and competitive advantage / Competition or coordination? / Value chain and innovation.
第8回:
【Core Weeks⑦】Face-to-face class / Class hours：《90minutes》
7.Resouce Based View / Intangible asset / Compitance management /
第9回:
【Core Weeks⑧】Face-to-face class / Class hours：《90minutes》
8.Knowkedge Management / SECI model/ tacit knowledge / explicit knowledge/ knowledge convergion
第10回:
【Core Weeks⑨】Face-to-face class / Class hours：《90minutes》
9.ORGANIZATIONAL STRUCTURE: Job design / Functions and divisions / Coordination.
第11回:
【Core Weeks⑩】Face-to-face class / Class hours：《90minutes》
10.ORGANIZATIONAL CONTROL: Output control / Behavior control / Organizational change.
第12回:
【Core Weeks⑪】Face-to-face class / Class hours：《90minutes》
11.HUMAN RESOURCE (MOTIVATION AND PERFORMANCE): Motivation / Training / Performance appraisal and feedback.
第13回:
【Core Weeks⑫】Face-to-face class / Class hours：《90minutes》
12.LEADERSHIP: Leadership styles / Empowerment / Leadership models.
第14回:
【Flex Hours】Face-to-face class / Class hours：《90minutes》
CONFLICT, NEGOTIATION AND POLITICS: Power / Strategies for managing organizational conflict, negotiation and politics.
第15回:
【Classes and examinations period(week1)】Face-to-face class / Class hours：《90minutes》

学生による授業評価の方法Course Evaluation by Student: To be conducted in the last class by using a standard form designated by SPS.

各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。https://kwic.kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1※kwicへのリンクとなります（在学生のみ閲覧可）
Feedback will be provided in the form ofdirect comments in class.
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading2: Active contribution to course discussions will be rewarded.
備考Note0:
Students have to take a course of management,ex.strategic management,management organization theory, management administration theory etc, in undergraduate. As resent academic papers of management area are using statistical methods, students have to understand and use these methods. 
I check student's learning level of management and statistical methods at first time lecture.
If student want to take this lecture, please contact me before you submit registration to school office.
